'''鈭歾h-th-h-w''' ('''kazhathhewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coapply|coapply]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coapply|coapply]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-th-h-w
|-
! Lemma
| kazhathhewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhathewoko|thizhathewoko]] || [[word:jizhathewoko|jizhathewoko]] || [[word:shizhathewoko|shizhathewoko]] || [[word:kizhathewoko|kizhathewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhathewoko|thuthuzhathewoko]] || [[word:jujuzhathewoko|jujuzhathewoko]] || [[word:shushuzhathewoko|shushuzhathewoko]] || [[word:kukuzhathewoko|kukuzhathewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhathewoko|thuzhathewoko]] || [[word:juzhathewoko|juzhathewoko]] || [[word:shuzhathewoko|shuzhathewoko]] || [[word:kuzhathewoko|kuzhathewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhathewoko|thuzhathewoko]] || [[word:juzhathewoko|juzhathewoko]] || [[word:shuzhathewoko|shuzhathewoko]] || [[word:kuzhathewoko|kuzhathewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhathewoko|thezhathewoko]] || [[word:jezhathewoko|jezhathewoko]] || [[word:shezhathewoko|shezhathewoko]] || [[word:kezhathewoko|kezhathewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhathewoko|thothozhathewoko]] || [[word:jojozhathewoko|jojozhathewoko]] || [[word:shoshozhathewoko|shoshozhathewoko]] || [[word:kokozhathewoko|kokozhathewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhathewoko|thozhathewoko]] || [[word:jozhathewoko|jozhathewoko]] || [[word:shozhathewoko|shozhathewoko]] || [[word:kozhathewoko|kozhathewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhathewoko|thozhathewoko]] || [[word:jozhathewoko|jozhathewoko]] || [[word:shozhathewoko|shozhathewoko]] || [[word:kozhathewoko|kozhathewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zhathewoko|th忙zhathewoko]] || [[word:j忙zhathewoko|j忙zhathewoko]] || [[word:sh忙zhathewoko|sh忙zhathewoko]] || [[word:k忙zhathewoko|k忙zhathewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhathewoko|thathazhathewoko]] || [[word:jajazhathewoko|jajazhathewoko]] || [[word:shashazhathewoko|shashazhathewoko]] || [[word:kakazhathewoko|kakazhathewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhathewoko|thazhathewoko]] || [[word:jazhathewoko|jazhathewoko]] || [[word:shazhathewoko|shazhathewoko]] || [[word:kazhathewoko|kazhathewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhathewoko|thazhathewoko]] || [[word:jazhathewoko|jazhathewoko]] || [[word:shazhathewoko|shazhathewoko]] || [[word:kazhathewoko|kazhathewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
